title: lagophylla hillmanii
intro: Lagophylla hillmanii, also known as Hillman's woolly plant or Hillman's desert marigold, is a shrub-like plant native to Western Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lagophylla hillmanii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
